hooks.command: input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE 'lint-baseline\.xml|detekt-baseline\.xml'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"HARD RULE: Never update lint baselines to make CI pass. Fix the actual lint errors instead."}'; else echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; fi

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -q 'app/src/.*\.kt'; then if ! echo "$file" | grep -q '/docs/'; then echo 'DOCS CHECK: You edited a source file that may affect user-visible behavior. Before declaring done: grep docs/ for references to this feature, update affected docs, flag stale screenshots. See CLAUDE.md Documentation Updates rule.'; fi; fi
